title: Luffy Stumbles into Nami’s Plan
description: On pages 9–12, this part raises the stakes in Orange Town as Buggy’s weapon and crew threaten the town directly.
scene: Orange Town becomes the stage for Nami’s schemes, Buggy’s violence, and Luffy’s refusal to act like a normal pirate.

dialogue.speaker: Buggy
dialogue.text: DO IT! NOW!! BLOW HIM TO PIECCES!!

dialogue.speaker: Buggy
dialogue.text: Oh no... what should I do?

dialogue.speaker: Buggy
dialogue.text: IF I DON'T KILL MAM, THEY'LL KILL ME!

dialogue.speaker: Buggy
dialogue.text: IF I MURDER HIM IN COLD BLOOD, THEN I'LL BE AS BAD AS A PIRATE TOO!

dialogue.speaker: Buggy
dialogue.text: NAM!!!!!!!!! Stop Stalling and light the cannon!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: UNPEREPARED!? YOU MEAN NOT BEING PREPARED TO KILL SOMEONE LIKE IT'S NOTHING?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: IS THAT WHAT "PEREPARED" MEANS TO A PIRATE?

dialogue.speaker: Buggy
dialogue.text: It means being prepared to risk your own life!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: DON'T YAKNOW HOW TO FIRE A CANNON?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Just put the flame to the fuse, and...

summary: The Orange Town conflict mixes Nami’s suspicious cleverness with Buggy’s theatrical cruelty. The section builds the unstable alliance that will oppose Buggy’s crew.
